project_type: React 19 + Vite 7 + TailwindCSS 4 + Radix UI frontend monorepo
build_system: pnpm workspaces, Vite for bundling. Build from artifacts/edms/ directory using npx vite build.
test_framework: vitest with jsdom environment, tests in src/test/smoke.test.ts
verification_instructions: 1. Run npx tsc --noEmit from repo root for typecheck. 2. Run cd artifacts/edms && npx vite build for build. 3. Run npx vitest run for tests.
setup_instructions: Dependencies already installed. No network access to install new packages.
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network mode - cannot install new packages. Must use only what exists in node_modules. No external HTTP calls. All services mock localStorage-based data stores.
contribution_requirements: Conventional commits, incremental commits after each logical unit, no breaking changes, use feature flags for risky additions.
key_patterns: Services use static class methods or const objects with Promise-based APIs. Pages are lazy-loaded default exports. UI primitives imported from components/ui/Shared.tsx (Button, Badge, GlassCard, PageHeader, Input, Select). Progress bar uses @radix-ui/react-progress. Badge has variants: default, success, warning, danger, processing, info. Spinner component at components/ui/spinner.tsx. Feature flags in lib/featureFlags.ts. Toast via sonner. Navigation uses react-router. State management is local useState plus localStorage persistence pattern (see PreferencesService, SearchHistoryService, NavigationHistoryService, OcrJobService).
directory_structure: artifacts/edms/src/pages/ - 35 page components (lazy-loaded). artifacts/edms/src/services/ - 27 service files (localStorage-backed mocks). artifacts/edms/src/components/ui/ - 75+ UI primitives. artifacts/edms/src/components/documents/ - document-specific components. artifacts/edms/src/hooks/ - 15 custom hooks. artifacts/edms/src/contexts/ - 7 context providers. artifacts/edms/src/lib/ - utilities, types, mock data, feature flags.
